JavaScript test scripts for object property comparison, access, and operations using the `plus` function.


## Files
- **[11.02.01-001.js](11.02.01-001.js.md)**: Tests object property comparison in JavaScript.
- **[11.02.01-002.js](11.02.01-002.js.md)**: Tests object property comparison using logical OR in JavaScript.
- **[11.02.01-003.js](11.02.01-003.js.md)**: A test script for verifying object property access in JavaScript.
- **[11.02.01-004.js](11.02.01-004.js.md)**: Tests object property access using a variable as a key in JavaScript.
- **[11.02.01-007.js](11.02.01-007.js.md)**: Tests the `plus` function to ensure it does not return a numeric sum of object values.
- **[11.02.01-008.js](11.02.01-008.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of multiplying object properties in a JavaScript function.
- **[11.02.01-009.js](11.02.01-009.js.md)**: Tests the `plus` function that concatenates the `value` properties of two objects.
- **[11.02.01-010.js](11.02.01-010.js.md)**: Tests the `plus` function that concatenates or adds the `value` properties of two objects.
- **[11.02.01-011.js](11.02.01-011.js.md)**: Tests the `plus` function that adds the `value` properties of two objects.
